using System;
using System.Threading.Tasks;
using ZeroAlloc.Flux;

namespace ZeroAlloc.Flux.Generated;

internal sealed class Store_Sample_ConfiguredState : IStore<global::Sample.ConfiguredState>
{
    private readonly object _lock = new();
    private global::Sample.ConfiguredState _state;

    public Store_Sample_ConfiguredState(System.IServiceProvider sp)
    {
        _state = global::Sample.ConfiguredState.Init(sp);
    }

    public global::Sample.ConfiguredState Value => _state;

    public event Action<global::Sample.ConfiguredState>? StateChanged;

    internal ValueTask UpdateAsync(global::Sample.ConfiguredState newState)
    {
        lock (_lock)
        {
            _state = newState;
        }
        StateChanged?.Invoke(newState);
        return ValueTask.CompletedTask;
    }
}
